title: Create: Trading floor
description: Automate trading with villagers using create!
body:
# Capital, now automated!
_**Brought to you by Untitled Modding Cooperation**_

[![Minecraft Storage banner](https://github.com/cakeGit/Create-Trading-Floor/blob/1.20.1/shelf/tradingfloor_banner.png?raw=true)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/create-trading-floor/guide)

## [See it in action!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7DvmP0f2wXE&ab_channel=SomeGuyCalledCak)

Plain and simple, **adds the trading depot block**, which can be used in create to automatically trade with villagers over the day. The block includes complete functionality with goggles, display links, belts, chutes and filters

![Villagers trading using the depot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4635c03eeffbe7da1c221f98494c34db2a3039e6.png)
